zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Drakes於1307年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾德斯費爾德時，他的父親Robert Drakes30歲，母親Katharine Clarell26歲。他於1334年與Lucy Mayfield在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾德斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Drakes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

variants.name: Drake
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Drakes was born in 1307, in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Drakes, was 30 and his mother, Katharine Clarell, was 26. He married Lucy Mayfield in 1334, in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Drakes(이)가 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 허더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Drakes(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katharine Clarell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 허더스필드에서 Lucy Mayfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
